name: Canva
description: Create and edit Canva designs, search templates, export images, and manage your Canva brand kit via Canva's official MCP integration. Generate design assets directly through the agent.

tools_summary.name: canva_create_design
tools_summary.description: Create a new Canva design from a template or blank

tools_summary.name: canva_search_templates
tools_summary.description: Search Canva templates by keyword and category

tools_summary.name: canva_export_design
tools_summary.description: Export a Canva design as PNG, PDF, or MP4

tools_summary.name: canva_list_designs
tools_summary.description: List the user's recent Canva designs

tools_summary.name: canva_get_brand_kit
tools_summary.description: Get the user's Canva brand colors, fonts and logos

tools_summary.name: canva_upload_asset
tools_summary.description: Upload an image to Canva as a brand asset

setup_instructions: Connect your Canva account via OAuth. Canva's MCP is available at mcp.canva.com for accounts with the Canva API access (Teams or Enterprise). Enable via Account Settings → Apps → Connect Canva.
